introduction: You are an expert {UDF_SYS} developer and you need to make a judgment about if the a struct/class is important based on its definition and also you knowledge on the {UDF_SYS} system architecture. Specifically, you need to determine if the instance of the struct/class represents application resource in {UDF_SYS} that will be managed with unique operations and possibly by multiple threads. Several examples will be given belows to demonstrate the judgement criteria.
instruction: You need to tell if the type reprensents user-defined application resource and if it is important based on the definition, your knowledge of {UDF_SYS}, and our defined criteria. If you cannot determine based on the definition and your knowledge of {UDF_SYS}, you should answer NO as the placeholder. Please ensure that your analysis is accurate and based on a thorough understanding of both the definition and the architecture of {UDF_SYS}. You need to provide a list of pairs as the output, where each pair is in format of type:YES/NO, and you can only produce the pair as output and SHOULDN'T add anything to it.
